midpositiondata.title: IT Support Analyst - Level 2
midpositiondata.descriptionbrief: A well-established London based IT company provides exceptional IT support to a range of small businesses who are predominantly in the UK supporting the financial sector.
midpositiondata.descriptionparaone: We pride ourselves on learning and understanding the needs of our clients, enabling us to give them excellent service. It goes without saying that you will need to have strong communication skills otherwise the technical knowledge you have will be wasted!
midpositiondata.descriptionparatwo: Our clients expect you to have all the usual technical knowledge they would expect from a company like ours whilst also understanding the demands of businesses that operate in a regulated environment. Your attention to detail, strict confidentiality, good organisational skills, excellent technical knowledge and a desire to help clients with their IT related issues will enable you to succeed in this role.
midpositiondata.descriptionparathree: The company was started 11 years ago and has developed a strong reputation with our clients for great service coupled with embracing up to date IT solutions.
midpositiondata.descriptionparafour: We are looking for an experienced IT Support Analyst who can operate Level 2 support, providing efficient, proactive, and expert-level service. Having the experience to help us give our clients the support experience they need and to develop our business. Have excellent spoken English, studies taken in English. Very good understanding of Microsoft 365 services and but not essential ESET Security Services. Excellent knowledge in PC repairs/Build.
midpositiondata.descriptionparafive: An excellent level of English is a pre-requisite for this role.
midpositiondata.descriptionparasix: The IT Support Analyst will be responsible for the following tasks:
midpositiondata.descriptionparaseven: Provide Level 1 and Level 2 technical support to internal users and clients, ensuring timely resolution of incidents and service requests.
midpositiondata.listitemone: Troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, operating system, network, and application-related issues.
midpositiondata.listitemtwo: Assist in the administration and support of:
midpositiondata.sublistitemtwo: Active Directory, Group Policy Objects (GPOs), DNS, DHCP, and standard Windows Server roles
midpositiondata.listitemthree: Perform routine user account management, permissions administration, and access control activities.
midpositiondata.listitemfour: Support and maintain virtual environments (e.g., Hyper-V, VMware, or cloud-hosted virtual machines) under the guidance of senior engineers.
midpositiondata.listitemfive: Administer and support Microsoft 365 services, including user management across Microsoft 365 Admin Centres for both internal operations and client environments.
midpositiondata.listitemsix: Assist with Azure Active Directory administration, Azure AD Connect synchronization, and user identity-related issues.
midpositiondata.listitemseven: Maintain and support SharePoint Online sites, document libraries, permissions, and user access requests.
midpositiondata.listitemeight: Support Microsoft Intune, Endpoint Manager, and other endpoint management solutions for device provisioning, configuration, and troubleshooting.
midpositiondata.listitemnine: Monitor backup systems, endpoint protection platforms, and infrastructure alerts, escalating issues where necessary.
midpositiondata.listitemten: Assist in implementing and supporting Microsoft 365 security and compliance features, including retention policies, auditing, and data protection controls.
midpositiondata.listitemeleven: Deploy approved software applications, updates, and security tools across end-user devices.
midpositiondata.listitemtwelve: Create and maintain technical documentation, support procedures, and knowledge base articles.
midpositiondata.listitemthirteen: Participate in system maintenance activities, software deployments, upgrades, and change implementation processes.
midpositiondata.listitemfourteen: Escalate complex technical issues to senior engineers and collaborate with other IT teams to ensure effective resolution.
midpositiondata.listitemfifteen: Provide end-user training and guidance on standard IT systems, applications, and security best practices.
midpositiondata.listitemsixteen: Ensure compliance with organizational IT policies, procedures, and security standards.
midpositiondata.secondtitleitemone: Graduate in related discipline, Information Technology, Computer Science
midpositiondata.secondtitleitemtwo: Prior experience of 3 years performing IT Support functions at level 2 in a remote working environment.
midpositiondata.secondtitleitemthree: Strong knowledge of operating systems and networks, advanced tools and applications.
midpositiondata.secondtitleitemfour: Strong problem solving, time management and communication skills.
midpositiondata.thirdtitleitemone: Timing: Winter: 10:00 AM to 07:00PM Summer: 09:00 Am to 06:00PM.
midpositiondata.thirdtitleitemtwo: Working Days: From Monday to Friday.
midpositiondata.thirdtitleitemfour: IPD & OPD: as per company policy.
midpositiondata.thirdtitleitemfive: Bonus: Performance & festival based as per company policy.
midpositiondata.lastmessage: If you believe your background meets the criteria, please submit your CV with a cover letter.
